bird.name: 塞舌爾隼
bird.summary: 塞舌爾隼（Falco araea），又名塞舌島隼，是塞舌爾特有的一種猛禽。 特徵 塞舌爾隼是最細小的隼，只長18-23厘米，翼展40-45厘米。牠們的翼較短及圓。雄隼的上身呈紅褐色，有黑色斑點，下身呈淡黃色，沒有斑點。頭部及臀部呈深藍灰色。尾巴是藍灰色的，有黑色斑紋。喙深色，腳…

relations.subject: 塞舌爾隼
relations.evidence: Threats are thought to include habitat loss due to logging, housing development and fires as well as predation and competition by introduced species
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 塞舌爾隼
relations.evidence: Threats are thought to include habitat loss due to logging, housing development and fires as well as predation and competition by introduced species
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
